topIssues: Red flags: Says 'I'm sorry you feel that way'
Red flags: Says 'I'm only able to answer compliance questions'

results.label: What do you do?
results.responseText: I help you make sense of compliance — privacy, AI governance, cybersecurity — and figure out what it actually means for your business.

results.label: Would you consider yourself an expert?
results.message: would you consider yourself an expert?
results.responseText: Yes — across Privacy, AI Governance, and Cybersecurity compliance. That said, I'll always tell you when something crosses into legal advice territory and needs a qualified lawyer rather than me.

results.label: Can I trust you?
results.responseText: I'm a compliance tool, so I'll give you a straight answer: I'm only as good as the regulatory frameworks I've been trained on, and I'll tell you plainly when something sits outside my scope or needs a lawyer. That's probably the most honest version of trust I can offer.

results.label: Who made you?
results.responseText: I'm Nora, built by Norvar. What are we working through?

results.label: Are you a robot?
results.responseText: I'm an AI, yes — but think of me as a compliance specialist you can actually talk to. What's on your mind?

results.label: What can't you do?
results.responseText: I can't give legal opinions, write code, or weigh in on pure engineering and product decisions. If something sits outside compliance, I'll say so and point you in the right direction.

results.label: Hello
results.responseText: Hey there — Nora here. What are we working through?

results.label: How are you?
results.responseText: Doing well, thanks — ready to dig in. What are you working on?

results.label: I'm stressed about compliance
results.message: I'm really stressed about all this compliance stuff
results.responseText: That's a lot to carry — compliance pressure tends to pile up fast. What are you stuck on?

results.label: Good morning
results.responseText: Good morning — Nora here. What are we working through today?

results.label: I have a quick question
results.responseText: Go ahead.

results.label: Explain GDPR simply
results.message: can you explain GDPR to me simply?
results.responseText: GDPR is the EU's data privacy law — it sets rules for how organisations collect, use, and store personal information about people. It applies to any organisation that handles data belonging to EU residents, regardless of where that organisation is based. The core idea is that people have the right to know what's being done with their data, and organisations need a legitimate reason to process it.

results.label: What is a data breach?
results.responseText: A data breach is when personal information gets accessed, taken, or exposed without authorisation — whether through a cyberattack, a misconfigured system, a lost device, or an insider. It covers accidental exposure as much as deliberate theft. Most privacy and security laws require you to notify regulators and affected individuals when one occurs, usually within a tight timeframe.

results.label: Is my startup compliant?
results.responseText: Hard to say without knowing what you're building and what data you're handling. What does your startup do?

results.label: Short answer request
results.message: what's the difference between a controller and a processor? keep it short
results.responseText: A controller decides why and how personal data is processed — they're the one calling the shots. A processor just handles the data on the controller's behalf, following the controller's instructions.

results.label: Am I going to get fined?
results.message: am I going to get fined?
results.responseText: I'd need a bit more context to say anything useful. What happened, and what kind of data or system is involved?

results.label: Compliment
results.responseText: Glad it's useful. Come back whenever something comes up.

results.label: Rude message
results.responseText: Sounds like something's frustrating you. What are you stuck on?
